raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against Barclays ( JetBlue XXXX ) for failing to properly resolve a billing dispute involving a charge from XXXX. In XXXX, I created an account with XXXX  and immediately XXXX what was labeled as the Auto Pay feature. I reasonably believed this would prevent future charges. However, in XX/XX/XXXX, I was charged again despite having turned off auto pay. 

I later discovered XXXX uses multiple auto-renewal settings buried in non-obvious locations, and the toggle labeled Auto Pay did not in fact stop billing. Their app also misleads users by redirecting to the website for cancellation, which is deceptive and intentionally confusing. 

I disputed the charge with Barclays, informing them this was unauthorized, deceptive, and fraudulent in my view. I received no benefit from the XXXX service and had no intent to renew. 

Despite repeated calls and documentation, Barclays has continued to uphold the charge and refuses to intervene. I have now had over XXXX conversations with their agents since XX/XX/XXXX. 

I am requesting that Barclays reverse the charge and acknowledge that I made good faith efforts to stop auto-renewal, and that XXXX interface was misleading and predatory
